decisions.reason: Current manifest adds the trust-preflight lane with exit 1 classified as expected yellow, preserving the launch-trust gate instead of collapsing endpoint smoke into launch green.
evidence: npm run trust:preflight generated expected-yellow trust packet

decisions.reason: Current preflight writes the Grafana missing-config proof to the cockpit-consumed grafana-otel-smoke-missing-config-preflight.json path.

Current Grafana proof records source identity so telemetry evidence carries checkout head, branch, dirty path, and generated-artifact context.

Current packet keeps landed zero-candidate bundles green, keeps review-decision metadata non-self-blocking, compares the staged package contract when package.json also has unrelated unstaged OCR dependency drift, and excludes that index-sourced package row from generated git-add commands.
